Welcome to
TWO FEET FIRST
OUR STORY

Savor the harmony of taste, comfort, and genuine hospitality. From timeless classics to chef-crafted creations, every dish is made with care — for experiences meant to be cherished.

About Us
Welcome to the

At TwoFeetFirst, we’re all about bold flavors, fresh ingredients, and drinks that brighten your day. From expertly brewed coffee by St. Ali to thickshakes, smoothies, cold-pressed juices, and refreshing spritzers — everything on our menu is crafted to energize and inspire.

Whether you’re fueling your morning with a latte, grabbing a smoothie after your workout, or catching up over an iced mocha — we’re here to serve up more than just great drinks. We’re here to bring good vibes, community, and something a little special to your everyday.

Proudly based in Melbourne, we bring you local favorites with our own playful twist. Sit back, sip up, and jump straight in.

Open Mon–Fri, 5am–3pm
Williams Road Café, Dandenong South

Family-owned café open from 5am. Great coffee, breakfast, hot meals, fresh sandwiches and daily specials. Dine in or take away.

Call (03) 9706 9580
View Menu
4 Deans Ct, Dandenong South
Mon–Fri 5am–3pm
Family-Run

We know our regulars by name

Quick Service

Respecting your lunch break

Fresh Daily

Homemade-style meals

We're a family owned café on Williams Road, serving the local community for over 10 years. Drop in for great coffee, hot meals, fresh sandwiches, salads, and a few sweet treats, with lighter options available too.

What we serve

Our menu includes breakfast favourites, toasted sandwiches, hot food and daily specials. We keep a mix of healthier choices and comfort food, so there's something for everyone.

Coffee and breakfast, made easy

Whether you're grabbing a quick takeaway coffee or sitting down for breakfast, we focus on friendly service and consistent quality. Ask about today's specials at the counter.

Visit us

Find us at 4 Deans Ct, Dandenong South VIC 3175. We're open early, making it easy to drop in on the way to work. For order ahead, call (03) 9706 9580.

Menu highlights

See a snapshot of customer favourites on our Menu Highlights page. Menu items can change, please check in store for the latest options.

ABOUT THE

Cupola Cafe & Grill

Welcome to Cupola Cafe and Grill!

Your go-to spot in Hallam for delicious food, fresh coffee, and a cozy vibe. We
took over an established café in 2024, with a mission to serve our community
with mouthwatering breakfasts, lunches, coffee, and catering.

What We Offer

From early morning coffees to satisfying lunches, we have something for
everyone. Need catering? We’ve got you covered! Plus, we have a function
space for up to 60 people.

Our Hours

Monday to Friday, 6:00 AM - 3:00 PM. Whether it’s a quick pick-me-up or a
meal, we’re here for you.

Why Cupola?

We’re all about good food, great company, and a friendly atmosphere. Your
perfect place for a quick bite or a special event!

Come See Us!

We can’t wait to welcome you at Cupola Cafe and Grill!

What’s brewing here?

COFFEE BUILDS YOUR BASE.
01BEAUTIFUL PLACE

Modern, stylish, and pet-friendly, Hendriks Café is a space where Melbourne café culture meets comfort. With indoor warmth and breezy outdoor seating, we’re your home away from home.

ABOUT US 
02FEEL THE COFFEE

Our baristas don’t just pour coffee — they perfect it. We use ZEST Specialty Coffee Roasters to deliver balanced espresso, silky milk textures, and bold single origins you’ll remember.

VIEW OUR MENU 
03FULL TASTE

From our signature Eggs Benedict to house-made toasties, seafood linguine, or lobster rolls — our all-day brunch menu is built for every craving and every moment.

GALLERY 
 

About Us

THE PERFECT MORNING, BREWED DAILY

At Hendriks Café, we’re more than just your local coffee stop — we’re a part of your daily rhythm. Tucked away in South Melbourne, we’ve become a community favourite for our specialty coffee, all-day brunch, and relaxed, pet-friendly vibe.

Whether you’re picking up a takeaway, setting up your laptop, or settling in for a long catch-up, we’re here to serve quality, comfort, and connection — one brew at a time.

Food.

Coffee. 

Catering.

Meals.

Real Food. Made Fresh.

The team at Thomas St have been making delicious, freshly made food in our Hampton store since 2011. We don't bulk make our food or use preservatives. We make real food that is made in small batches, which is why our food tastes so good.

Order Online Now
Our Store Location
WHAT WE DO
ORDER NOW
IN STORE DELI

Visit our shop in Hampton and pick up some delicious food from our deli - pies, muffins, slice, sandwiches, salads, frittata and more. Options change daily. Food can be heated up in store or for cold take away. Great coffee too of course!

Find Out More
CATERING BOXES

Great value and great taste! Our Thomas St Food Co Catering Boxes come in many options including  sandwich box, party pie box, sweet boxes and more. 24 hours notice required.

Find Out More
PRE-MADE MEALS

Great range of real food ready for you to re-heat and serve at home! All Thomas St Food Co meals are made from fresh ingredients an include casseroles, pies, lasagne, soups, sausage rolls and much more. Pick up in store or order online. 

Find Out More
GIFT CARDS

Give the gift of delicious & tasty food to family and friends with one of our eGift Cards that can be used on any online purchases including meals and catering.

Find Out More
COFFEE & DRINKS

Of course we do coffee... plus a whole lot more in the drinks department! Shakes, tea, iced coffee and chocolate, smoothies. We are even licensed, so you can grab a local wine or beer if that's what you fancy. 

Find Out More
HOUSEMADE PIES

We can't not mention our amazing house made pies. We have around 10 different flavours that we rotate daily - available in single serve and family pie size. options. 

Find Out More
Visit us in store! 116A Thomas St, Hampton  |  9598 1916 
LOCAL FAVOURITES
View Menu
Our Pies

Our delicious house made pies have been a local favourite for over 7 years. With plenty of flavours, all made with local ingredients, they are a winner every time of year!

Muffins

Much like our pies, our muffins walk out the door every day. We make at least 2 sweet flavours and 1 savoury and they are perfect with coffee

Coffee

Yes, of course we do a great coffee - otherwise our locals wouldn't come back! We use Cisco for our beans and they are the best!

The Combi story started in Byron Bay, New South Wales with simple toasties and coffee being sold out of an actual Volkswagen combi van. Fast-forward a few years and over 1500 kilometres and Combi now serves as a pillar of health, wellbeing, and spirituality in the Elwood community. 

All coffee sold at Combi Elwood is 100% organic and certified fair trade.

100% Organic Coffee Sold Here
About Us
Acai Bowls, Smoothies + So Much More

A feel good destination where great vibes and nutritious eats collide! At 138 - 140 Ormond Rd, Elwood our healthy haven is all about food that’s good for the mind, body, planet and soul!

We’re talking organic smoothies, açai bowls, savoury snacks and a selection of delicious, raw/vegan cakes. Our menus is designed to be vibrant, guilt-free and full of all the flavours mother nature intended.

See Our Menu
Oooh Baby I Like it Raw!
Custom Cakes by Combi.

Treat yourself to the irresistible world of Combi Elwood's raw and vegan cakes, each one made to order and a guilt-free masterpiece. Crafted with nothing artificial, our cakes boast a luxurious cashew nut centre, resting on a base of almonds, coconut, and dates, all sweetened with organic maple syrup.

bagelicious-elsternwick:
THE BAGELICIOUS
Bagel
You know it’s truly bagelicious when you get to pick every single filling that goes in your bagel. Find the perfect balance, or stack it high with goodness—it’s all up to you!
ORDER NOW
Bagelicious
Bagelicious is the go-to bagel spot in Melbourne’s liveliest food hub, Glenhuntly Road in Elsternwick. Brimming with bagels and other delicious bites and sips, freshly baked and brewed for every meal of the day, you can count on us to satisfy your bagel cravings and fill your belly with the warmth and fuel you need to take on the day.
Fancy a bagel?
Come over to Bagelicious!
ORDER NOW
What Do You
Feel LIKE?

Up to 17 bagel flavours and a huge menu of dips,
cheeses, patties, fillings, toppings, sides, drinks,
desserts & more!

ORDER NOW

At Bagelicious, we believe that bagels are more than just soft, ring-shaped pieces of yumminess—even if that’s good enough reason to have one! To us, the bagel is an expression of individuality. It’s made of the stuff that everyone loves (who doesn’t love soft, luscious bread?), and yet, it has a wonderful character of its own.

When you eat at Bagelicious, you get to explore your individuality and express your wonderful character while enjoying a combination of exciting flavours, fillings and sides of your choice, to suit your unique tastes. With up to 17 varieties of freshly baked bagels and a wide range of scrumptious dips, cheeses, meats, patties and toppings, you can be sure that your special bagel will scream of two things: You, and delicious.

What’s more—with a vast selection of beverages including freshly brewed coffee and homemade fresh juices, as well as your favourite sides, salads, soups, cakes, cookies, muffins and more!—you can be sure you won’t be leaving our shop without saying

“That was Bagelicious!”
“Food safety is one of our main Priorities”

Voted highest-rated for food, coffee, staff and atmosphere!

Discover why locals love us!

Book Now

A Boutique with a Touch of Charm
★ ★ ★ ★ ★

They asked for a review and of course I said yes!!! Such a beautiful cafe and flower/gift shop. Some very cute gifts at decent prices. I have coffee here regularly and it's always good. Today I had the caramel slice too and it was yummy. They don't always have much gluten free options but they are fairly new, I'm sure once they get busier they'll be able to stock more of the alternative stuff. In terms of the gift shop, I bought one of their scrunchies a few months back and it's quality and going strong. I just bought a bear candle as a gift. Very reasonably priced and really nice scent. And the service! Staff here are so friendly and accommodating. It's always lovely to be greeted with such a welcoming attitude and service. Definitely recommend this cafe.

Read more
Katie
★ ★ ★ ★ ★

Absolutely love this cafe. So clean, friendly and both indoor and outdoor seating. The take home salads and cakes are so good, and very affordable. I just bought a quinoa and black bean salad and there were lots of options for all tastes. An added bonus is the gorgeous gifts available to buy. From scented candles to unusual jewellery, from cushions to bags/sunglasses, everything is just that bit different from other shops.

Read more
Jane Upton
★ ★ ★ ★ ★

Loveliest cafe with gift shop concept, so many jewelry and candles with creatives shape. The food is on point, love their new hot breakfast and lunch menu, large generous portion with reasonable price around 20ish, very filling and delicious. They cook by olive oil so their food are healthy and nice. Kids menu are available so it s a nice place for families!

Read more
Alice H
★ ★ ★ ★ ★

Partner and I tried this cafe for the first time and thought the food was delicious! The atmosphere was a wonderful vibe and service was awesome. Will definitely be back here

★ ★ ★ ★ ★

Such lovely service and absolutely amazing people! Very fresh salad, and very good value. Staff go above and beyond all the time, coffee was top notch will definitely be back, and 100% will be recommending this place. The lil trinket wall is just too cute!

t-house-at-jells-wheelers-hill:
Lakeside dining at Jells Park
Our Menu Make a Booking
Welcome to
 T House At Jells!

Nestled in the heart of Jells Park, T House is a hidden gem offering a serene escape from the bustle of daily life. Surrounded by breathtaking views of rolling green landscapes and the tranquil waters of a picturesque lake, our café provides a haven where nature and relaxation meet.

Step into a warm and inviting space designed to complement its natural surroundings, where the sound of rustling leaves and birdsong creates a peaceful ambiance. T House is the perfect setting to start your day with a freshly brewed coffee, indulge in a leisurely lunch crafted from seasonal ingredients, or unwind with a soothing cup of tea as the sun dips below the horizon.

Whether you're seeking a quiet moment alone, a cozy spot to connect with loved ones, or simply a place to soak in the beauty of nature, T House offers an unforgettable experience tailored to your pace. Let us be your sanctuary for relaxation, rejuvenation, and memorable moments in the heart of Jells Park.

 

Opening Hours 🌿

Kiosk: Open Mon-Tue, 8:00AM-3PM; Sat-Sun, 7:30 AM – 3:00 PM

Restaurant For BREAKFAST & LUNCH: Open Wed-Sun, 8:00 AM – 3:00 PM

 

Menu
Gallery
Our Offerings: We are a Fully Licensed Hospitality Venue offering a range of services including Breakfast, Lunch & Private Functions.
Brewed with Care: 

Enjoy our artisan coffee made from ethically sourced beans, perfectly brewed to awaken your senses. From smooth lattes to bold cold brews, there's something for every coffee lover.

Freshly Baked Delights:

 Indulge in our selection of delicious pastries and baked goods, made fresh daily. Savor the warmth of our buttery croissants, rich muffins, and decadent cakes while taking in the serene view.

Seasonal Nourishment:

Our café features a menu inspired by the changing seasons, emphasizing fresh, locally-sourced ingredients. Delight in wholesome salads, gourmet sandwiches, and heartwarming soups that nourish the body and soul.

A Serene Escape:

The T House offers a peaceful haven where the soothing sounds of nature complement your dining experience. Enjoy our outdoor seating surrounded by lush greenery, or relax indoors with panoramic views of the park & lake.

Community & Events:

🎉 Host Your Next Celebration at T House! 🌿

Looking for the perfect venue for your special occasion? Nestled in the heart of Jells Park, T House is the ideal setting to make your celebrations truly unforgettable. Surrounded by lush greenery and serene lake views, our café offers a magical backdrop for birthdays, anniversaries, bridal showers, baby showers, and more.

✨ Why Choose T House?

Breathtaking Location: Celebrate amidst nature's beauty with stunning park and lake views.
Customizable Spaces: From intimate gatherings to larger parties, our versatile spaces can be tailored to suit your needs.
Delectable Menu: Enjoy a variety of dishes and beverages crafted with care, featuring fresh, seasonal ingredients.
Relaxed Atmosphere: Create lasting memories in a peaceful and welcoming environment.
Dedicated Team: Our friendly staff will ensure every detail of your event is perfect, so you can focus on celebrating with your guests.

🎈 Let’s Make It Special!
Whether it’s a casual gathering or an elegant affair, T House adds charm and warmth to every event. Contact us today to discuss your vision and let us bring your dream celebration to life.

📞 Book Your Event Now! Call or send us an email using booking button below and reserve your date.

Celebrate. Unwind. Create memories. Only at T House. 🌸

Stay Connected:

Follow us on social media for the latest news, special promotions, and updates about our events. Join our café community, where every visit feels like coming home.

Visit Us:

Escape the hustle and bustle of everyday life. Come visit us at T House where every seat offers a scenic view of the park & lake. 

 

Start your day with a freshly brewed coffee at the kiosk or enjoy a delicious meal in our restaurant. We’re here every day to make your visit to Jells Park unforgettable! ☕🍴

yuca-melbourne-toorak:
Toorak's Favourite Neighbourhood Café

At Yuca Melbourne, we take breakfast and brunch seriously — think XO Folded Eggs, Turkish Eggs, and handcrafted specialty coffee from some of the world's best roasters. Located in the heart of Toorak, we're your go-to from Monday to Sunday.

 

Whether it's a quiet coffee before work, a long weekend brunch with friends, or a glass of wine over lunch — Yuca is where Toorak comes together. Every dish is made fresh using locally sourced ingredients, and our coffee program features exceptional single-origins and reserve espresso.

​

Looking for a café in Toorak? Yuca Melbourne at 1A Grange Road is open Monday to Friday from 7am and weekends from 8am. We serve a full breakfast and brunch menu, specialty filter coffee, and a curated drinks list including natural wines and mimosa.

Gift Card 
Shop Merchandise 
About Us

Yuca Melbourne is Toorak's neighbourhood café — a place built for people who take their food and coffee seriously. Located at 1A Grange Road, we serve an all-day menu that goes well beyond the standard café fare, with dishes like Gyudon Eggs with tender beef, miso butter corn rice and pickled daikon, Turkish Gnocchi with house-made potato gnocchi and harissa butter, and XO Folded Eggs with fermented chilli sambal and prawns.

​

Our coffee is roasted by Locale — one of Melbourne's most respected specialty roasters. Alongside our espresso bar, we run a rotating pour-over program featuring single-origins from producers around the world, plus reserve espresso and a full tasting tray for those who want to explore. Whether it's your first flat white of the morning or a slow filter on a Sunday, every cup is made with care.

​

The menu changes with the seasons and reflects the team's love of global flavours done with precision — from Mushroom Cassoulet with celeriac purée and buttered focaccia, to French Toast with Nutella mousse and caramelised banana, to a Fattoush Salad with whipped feta and pomegranate. We also have a dedicated kids menu, a full pastry selection baked fresh daily, and a curated drinks list featuring natural wines, cold-pressed juices and signature specialty drinks.

​

Yuca is part of the Hospokendra group, alongside Dumbo Melbourne in West Footscray and Sani Melbourne in Brunswick East. We're open seven days — Monday to Friday from 7am, weekends from 8am. Come as you are.
einstein-251-caulfield-north:
Einstein's 251 Cafe
  NEW 2026 MENU

About our cafe:

Einstein’s 251 celebrates Albert Einstein and his Jewish heritage, in cafe form. Set in the heart of Caulfield North, the eatery honours the genius by serving clever food, merging Melbourne-style breakfast and brunch with Middle Eastern food.

Take a look at our new menu: there are a few new dishes and our old classics which everyone loves.

Fusion dishes include halloumi breakfast and shakshuka. Ingredients include pomegranate, za’atar, dukkah and tahini, splashed throughout the menu to emphasise the liveliness of Middle Eastern food. A funky fit-out of exposed brick, high stools and comfortable tables plus gentle lighting allows you to fully immerse in our food and beverages.

A Sanremo machine paired with Grinders roasters provides luxurious and tasty coffee and fresh Chai. You can sip away in the courtyard with friends, or enjoy takeaway.

WE HOPE TO SEE YOU SOON!

market-lane-coffee-south-yarra:
Prahran Market
OPENING HOURS

MON-THUS: 7AM-4PM
FRI & SAT: 7AM-5PM
SUN: 8AM-4PM

ADDRESS

WURUNDJERI WOI WURRUNG COUNTRY
SHOP 13, PRAHRAN MARKET

163 COMMERCIAL ROAD
(ENTRANCE ON ELIZABETH ST)

SOUTH YARRA 3141
VICTORIA, AUSTRALIA

VIEW MAP
Our oldest and largest shop, located in the historic, bustling Prahran Market, alongside some of Melbourne’s best food retailers.

This original flagship Market Lane location first opened in 2009, and was given a loving update and renovation in early 2024. It’s open 7 days a week, with plenty of seating to accommodate market shoppers, and ample space for the hustle and bustle of trolleys and prams.

We serve filter and espresso drinks at this shop, as well as teas by Assembly, hot chocolate by Mörk, and fresh juices. We offer a range of delicious sandwiches and baguettes, made with seasonal ingredients from some of the market’s best vendors. We also serve granola, pastries from Wild Life Bakery, and bread and jam featuring Baker Bleu baguette, Will Studd Le Conquerant butter and Annie Smithers’ much-loved jam. On Saturdays and Sundays, we serve our famous mushroom burgers here from 9am–2pm (or until sold out).

We roast coffee on a 5kg Probat roaster at this location, and our retail shelves are stocked with freshly roasted beans, as well as all our favourite brewing equipment, homewares, and coffee books and gifts.

You can join a public coffee cupping (tasting) here every Tuesday at 10am. (And we’ll soon be running roasting classes here as well – watch this space!)

This shop is nestled in the corner of Prahran Market, very happily located among some of the best food retailers in Melbourne, including Mushroom Man Damian Pike, Sweet Greek, Essential Ingredient, Claringbold's and G.McBean Family Butcher.

See our other locations.

pardon-coffee-prahran:
OUR COFFEE

At Pardon we take our coffee seriously, and we know you do too. That's why we choose Undercover Roaster's Signature BLK blend as our house blend.

Consisting of 50% Colombian, 25% Ethiopian and 25% Guatemalan beans, this blend gives a clean, sweet and well balanced cherry acidity. With its notes of honey, nougat, almonds and dark cocoa, this blend will keep you coming back day after day.

Coffee
OUR FOOD

At Pardon we offer a range of different tasty treats, perfectly matched to your mood.

Whether you're after a nice nourishing breakfast or lunch or just a cheeky afternoon snack with your coffee, our selection of sandwiches, croissants, bagels, wraps, cakes and sweets will be sure to hit the spot.

Come and enjoy the Pardon vibe with seating indoors or out in the sunshine, or grab your lunch on the run with our new online ordering system and spread the word about the best cafe in Prahran!

WHY PARDON?

At Pardon we like to get to know our customers just as we like them to get to know us.

Our ambience, just like our coffee, is all about warmth and friendliness - creating a cosy environment where you can come and relax, read our selection of books, chat with your friends and know you’ll be well looked after by our amazing staff. We look forward to having you!

panineria-ashburton:
Our Menu

Welcome to Panineria – your ultimate destination for authentic Italian panini and aromatic coffee in Ashburton! At Panineria, we take pride in offering a taste of Italy right here in Ashburton, with our carefully crafted menu featuring a delightful selection of panini and freshly brewed coffee. From the moment you step through our doors, you’ll be transported to the bustling streets of Italy, where every bite and sip brings you closer to the heart of Italian cuisine. Join us at Panineria and embark on a culinary journey filled with flavor, tradition, and passion. Explore our menu today and experience the true essence of Italian dining.

miss-ash-cafe-ashburton:
Miss Ash
Ashburton's Little European
​
​
Check out our socials for news and updates!
 
 
European inspired cafe in Ashburton!
Classic dishes and fresh ingredients
Choose from classic breakfast dishes, fresh salads, home made pastas, fresh seafood, decedent deserts, and pastries and cakes straight from the oven. 
BREAKFAST/LUNCH
Friday nights

Join us each month, for one special night

​of dinner, drinks and seriously good vibes!

Last Friday night: 2nd MAY

Theme: 'A WINE NIGHT TO REMEMBER!'

Next event coming soon. Booking essential, these events will fill quickly

Coffee, smoothies and booze!
Take a walk along the Anniversary Trail and stop by our window for a super smoothies, fresh juices or a cheeky cocktail!
 
Catering and Functions
We love to party! Get in touch to chat about how we can help you with your function. Large soirees, intimate gatherings, office brunches, drinks and snacks, we have extensive experience in catering and coordinating events. Check out our instagram for more photos of recent events. Upstairs functions and private dining also available on request.

DINING IN WONDERLAND
A SEASONAL MENU THAT FEEDS YOUR WILD IMAGINATION!

We’ve taken a page from Alice’s Adventures in Wonderland to transform raw ingredients into tasteful plates and colourful treats. We pride ourselves on the diligence of the Main Kitchen, Pastry and Barista Teams to keep the menus updated every turn of the season so we can take advantage of and showcase the freshest ingredients we can get our hands on. This exercise not only keeps the whole team inspired and excited, it also presents a continuing challenge to push their imaginations to the limits, to always think out of the square and to keep improving themselves by learning from the rest of the team and their outside influences.

 

ALLERGEN WARNING: Menu items may contain or come into contact with WHEAT, GLUTEN, EGGS, PEANUTS, TREE NUTS, SESAME SEED, SOY, FISH, SHELLFISH AND DAIRY. Our kitchens are NOT gluten-free NOR allergen-free certified. It is for this reason we advise people who are highly sensitive to certain allergens to avoid ordering off the menu and just bring in food that is suitable for them. For more information and if in doubt, please speak to any one of our friendly staff.

We are also NOT halal-certified. However, we use halal chicken and cream in some of our dishes. We have several vegetarian and vegan options available that may suit too.

cafe-brontos-boronia:
Get Directions
It's not just a cafe
About Us
Dedicated to Quality

  

Welcome to Café Brontos!

Established in 2021 during lockdown. We pride ourselves in being a family run business. Brontos pulls inspiration from the  60’s TV sitcom, ‘The Flinstones’, with a variety of our delicious menu items having fun names with reference to their wonderful Stone Age world. We are committed to providing our customers (all the Wilma’s, Fred’s and future little Pebbles) with impeccable food, made with fresh local produce as well as incredible coffee.

As a small business we also strive to have a positive impact on society in more ways than great food and coffee. We are huge supporters of MND Victoria, a charity very close to our hearts. With the support of our customers, staff and friends we have collectively been able to raise over $35,000 and counting. 

Cafe, best coffee, gelato, breakfast, brunch, kids friendly, kids menu, pet menu, outdoor dine in, catering

Stay A While

Come and try our local and international breakfast, brunch and lunch menu and speciality coffee

More than Drinks

Although we offer a wide variety of hot and iced drinks, we also provide savory and sweet food options. So whether you're stopping for your morning coffee, lunch, or an afternoon snack, we've got you covered!

MENU

Discover Delicious Breakfast, Lunch, and Daily Fresh Treats at 1 in 20 Cafe

At 1 in 20 Cafe, we pride ourselves on offering an extensive menu for breakfast and lunch, along with a selection of fresh, handcrafted items in our display cabinet, made daily by our talented team of qualified chefs and a pastry chef.

Download Autumn / Winter Menu

Fresh Daily Creations
Our daily offerings include crowd favorites like:

Muffins
Protein Balls
Banana Bread
Yo-Yos
Friands
Wraps
Salads
Toasties
…and more!
Be sure to check our display cabinet regularly for new and exciting choices.

Exceptional Coffee to Start Your Day
Being a Melbourne cafe, we know great coffee is essential. That’s why we proudly serve beans from The Bean Cartel Coffee Roasters. Our signature blend, El Capitan, is complemented by a rotating selection of their single-origin beans, which also shine in our cold brew.

Enjoy Local Brews and Spirits
We’re a licensed venue, so you can pair your meal with a beer, wine, or spirit after your morning coffee. We proudly support local producers, featuring:

Ginfinity Gins and Killik Rums from Belgrave
Killer Sprocket Beers brewed in Bayswater

Whether you’re stopping by for breakfast, lunch, or a relaxing afternoon drink, 1 in 20 Cafe offers something for everyone. Visit us in The Basin, at the foothills of the Dandenong Ranges, and enjoy the best of local flavors and hospitality.

Discover this place

Tico’s Drive Thru, located at 549 Geelong Road, Brooklyn, is fast becoming a favorite spot for coffee enthusiasts in Victoria. This drive-thru café is celebrated for its exceptional service and a menu that caters to coffee lovers on the go. Customers rave about the quality of their brews, particularly the cappuccino and flat white, highlighting the expertise of their baristas. Ash Brient, a satisfied patron, notes, "your coffee is made to perfection," emphasizing the consistent quality that Tico’s delivers.

Quick service is another standout aspect. Karen Bleakley appreciates the friendly staff and the efficiency of the service, making it an ideal stop for those rushing to work. Despite the upbeat music, the overall experience is delightful and brief—a key reason she'll drive 15 minutes just for a cup at Tico’s.

Affordability also plays a role in their appeal, as noted by Jiva Indra, who appreciates the high standards at reasonable prices. Whether you opt for invigorating lattes or a refreshing chai latte, Tico’s Drive Thru is shaping up to be a beloved coffee destination that does justice to its loyal patrons' high expectations.

miss-anam-seddon:
Miss An’am
Menu
Delicious and healthy Vietnamese cuisine

 

Good Vietnamese food is all about the brilliant balance of flavours – the sweet and the savoury, the cooling and the warming, the fresh and the fermented – and that’s what we’re all about!

Our food is influenced by our owner, Laura’s, Northern Vietnamese upbringing in Hanoi, where the food has a much stronger French influence and is saltier, as opposed to the sweeter food of the South.

We’d love you to try our light lunch of made-to-order rice paper rolls, banh mi piled high with fresh fillings or scrumptious sushi. Or indulge in a soul-satisfying bowl of homemade pho, traditional beef stew or crispy Vietnamese salads.

Our menu is healthy and fresh and easily adapted to cater for vegetarians, vegans and allergies.

lola-seddon:
Lola Cafe Seddon
Quality Family Meals, With the Best Views at Lola Cafe Seddon

Lola Café Seddon has a deep history, a rather funky history – as interesting as the founder, Beatriz Fernandez. More affectionately known as Mama Bear. Beatriz, a native Portuguese with a heart for people and for cooking, explored alternative avenues after closing down the CBD café Lorca. Lola was born, named after Beatriz’s favourite flamingo dancer. Armed with a vision and a great sense of direction for the new space, the community-driven, family-focused environment was created to serve both kids and parents. A warm, safe and friendly manner provides a secure area for the kids to play while mum and dad enjoy their meal.
 
Our Spanish café menu boasts a wide selection of breakfasts, seafood dishes, meat and vegetarian dishes, for sit-down or takeaway, we provide something for everyone. We serve a variety of classics like Spanish vegetarian pisto, smashed avocado and Lisbon breakfast with black pudding, to name but a few. Our freshly-baked delicacies are a mouth-watering experience – everything is worth a try.

About us

Beatriz Fernandez, or “Mama Bea” as she’s affectionately called, named Lola after her favorite flamenco dancer, whose imperious portrait dominates the otherwise muted interior. 

The Portuguese native started this inner-west Spanish Portuguese venue after selling her CBD café Lorca. We loved the area’s friendly, family-focused community.

Lola has a kid's menu and activities corner to keep the kids occupied while parents relax with a morning coffee.

 

The menu has a fairly even spread of vegetarian, seafood and other meat dishes.

On the breakfast menu are classics such as Birches Muesli, - Spanish Pancake - Mushroom Deluxe - Smashed Avocado & Halloumi- Spanish Corn Fritters - Lisbon Breakfast - Barcelona Egg Benedict - Free Range Eggs your way - Green Eggs - Chilli Scrambled as well as a selection of baked goods.

There’s also a range of freshly squeezed juices and smoothies. 

The extensive lunch menus include dishes such as Mushroom & Blue Cheese Croquettes, Squids ink Croquettes, Reuben Sandwich, Paella, Mediterranean Lamb Salad, Under the Sea …

To drink, choose from a selection of beer and wine both local and imported from Portugal and Spain and house-made sangria

Dine-in or takeaway at our Retro- Industrial chic cafe. Indulge your sences with Spanish and Portuguese classic dishes and Mebourne great coffee

Try Our Cafe
Our Menu
THE BEST COFFEE SHOP IN SEDDON

We're one of the best located café in the heart of Seddon! From Lola the whole of Seddon in your view. Whether you need a cosy spot to enjoy a coffee and brunch on your own or with friends or you're looking to host a large family or business event, Lola café have you covered. Book a table today to see what makes us your best local choice for food and coffee in Seddon.

Our Reviews

We are proud of our café. We want you to love it as much as we do. We have a 5 rating on Facebook and 4.5 on Google and are so pleased when people take the time to write up a review of their dining experiences at Lola. We thank everyone for their contributions.

Please also feel free to leave your own review on our social pages using the links below

Read our reviews

WONDERFUL LOCAL EATING

Lola Café is a local landmark with great food and a great location. We're conveniently located in Seddon Village near public transit and with plenty of parking.

If you need a location for an upcoming event, our team will help with planning and carrying it out. Contact us for engagement parties, work dinners, baby showers and more.

INCLUSIVE ATMOSPHERE

Whether you're looking for specific dietary needs or just for a place where your kids and pets will be welcome, Lola Cafe is happy to serve everyone's needs.

Overview & Highlights

Welcome to Embassy Cafe, a hidden gem nestled on Spencer Street in West Melbourne. This charming cafe brings a unique blend of nostalgia and mouth-watering fare that evokes memories of simpler times. With its quirky, retro decor and an ambiance that invites you to unwind, Embassy Cafe offers more than just a meal; it’s an experience.Restaurants

Open 24/7, this delightful eatery caters to those late-night cravings or early morning hunger pangs, serving an enticing array of hearty dishes. Their  burger selection is particularly impressive. You can choose from a custom 100% beef burger loaded with your favorite toppings for just A$11.30, or indulge in the Classic Double Cheeseburger, boasting double cheese and luscious sauce at A$14.30. For the adventurous eater, the Old School Lot  Burger—a delightful combination of egg, bacon, cheese, fresh vegetables, and sauces—is a standout at A$18.00.

Each bite at Embassy Cafe comes with a promise of satisfaction and value, as shared by numerous customers. One patron, 'Con Fitos,' captures the essence of the cafe perfectly, stating, “Amazing  burgers and old school decor.” You can truly taste the nostalgia in every bite, making it a must-visit for burger enthusiasts.

Breakfast lovers should not miss out on the Big Breakie Roll, featuring a hearty mix of double egg, bacon, and cheese, complete with a potato cake and tangy BBQ sauce for just A$13.50. The HCT Toastie is another must-try, offering a comforting blend of ham, cheese, and tomato that fits the bill for any time of day.

Those who prefer sides won't be disappointed either; the Fried and Steamed Dim Sims provide an excellent accompaniment to any meal, priced at A$10.00 for four pieces. The reviews have been high and consistent, with patrons raving about the generous portions and the delightfully home-style flavors.

Embassy Cafe is not just a spot to grab a bite; it's a nostalgic trip back in time, celebrating the flavors of yesteryear while ensuring customer satisfaction. With its commitment to quality and quirky charm, it's no wonder this establishment is a cherished location among locals. However, do keep in mind that they only accept cash, a charmingly retro touch that adds to the cafe's unique character.

If you're in the mood for a great meal in a nostalgic setting, Embassy Cafe is where you should head. The friendly staff and comforting dishes will undoubtedly leave a lasting impression, making each visit worthwhile.

hot-poppy-cafe-north-melbourne:
Welcome to Hot Poppy Cafe: A Community Hub for Exceptional Coffee and Cuisine​

Join us in the heart of North Melbourne and experience our contemporary interiors, pet-friendly atmosphere, and delicious menu offerings.

BOOK A TABLE NOW
ORDER ONLINE
TELEPHONE RESERVATIONS
‭+61 3 9326 9299‬
Welcome to Hot Poppy Cafe, a beloved brunch destination nestled in the heart of North Melbourne for over 20 years
Our café embodies a strong community spirit, offering a warm and inviting atmosphere that makes everyone feel like part of the family. Whether you’re a local or a first-time visitor, we’ve created a space where you can relax, enjoy, and feel right at home.

Step inside our chic and contemporary interiors, where modern design meets comfort. We pride ourselves on delivering a diverse menu, featuring brunch favorites like avocado toast and eggs benedict, along with our renowned, skillfully prepared coffee made from the finest beans. Whether you’re looking for a cozy spot to catch up with friends or a quick, delicious bite on the go, we’ve got you covered.

Hot Poppy Cafe is not just about great food and coffee; it’s also a pet-friendly haven! Our seating options include cozy indoor spaces, refreshing outdoor spots, and vibrant sidewalk seating. Enjoy the lively street scene of North Melbourne with your furry companions by your side.
Visit Us Today!
Our café is located at 9 Errol Street, a heritage-listed building that dates back to the mid-19th century

The area was once part of a bustling Victorian-era shopping precinct and retains much of its historical charm, with many buildings maintaining their original features. This rich history adds a unique character to our location, offering a blend of old-world charm and modern-day comforts.

Drop in for brekkie or lunch without a booking, 7 days a week!

Plan Ahead and Secure Your Spot at Hot Poppy Cafe!

Looking forward to a delightful brunch or a cozy coffee break? Make sure you have the perfect table waiting for you by reserving ahead. Whether you're planning a casual meet-up or a special occasion, booking a table guarantees a seamless experience at our café. Simply visit our website or give us a call to secure your spot. We can't wait to welcome you to the best of North Melbourne's café culture!

Delivery & Pickup Options

Can't make it to the café? No worries! We offer delivery during our open hours. Place your order online for a convenient delivery right to your doorstep, or for an easy pick-up. Enjoy our exceptional menu from the comfort of your home, without missing out on the Hot Poppy experience.

Don’t wait—reserve your table now or order for delivery, and treat yourself to an unforgettable meal!

Hot Poppy Cafe Specialties
Hot Poppy Cafe presents a delectable menu that caters to all tastes and preferences. From classic breakfast dishes to creative lunch options, our culinary team carefully crafts each dish with fresh, high-quality ingredients, elevating your dining experience.

Nestled in the Heart of North Melbourne

The historic Errol Street is one of the most quintessentially ‘Melbourne’ districts in town. Take a stroll beneath heritage terrace buildings in the dappled shade of second hand stores and funky restaurants. Errol´s is charming both inside and out, with its deep mahogany brick facade, gorgeous outdoor seating and unique designer light fittings. Come here for exquisite coffee brewed by real baristas, wholesome mod-oz breakfasts or mean meals served through the rest of the day. We have a wide range of generous breakfast, lunch and dinner options that will be sure to leave you licking your lips.

And be sure to check out our huge array of cakes and treats from the on-premise bakery. Lunch and dinnertime highlights are the gourmet pizzas, which will take you through adventures of unimaginably delicious savoury combinations. And, of course, there are all our pub favourites to be enjoyed like steaks, burgers, and fish and chips. So, next time you’re walking through Errols Street, North Melbourne, join us for quality food, excellent service and great prices.

The Espressonist Brunch Kitchen & Coffee & Wine Bar

The Espressonist is a premier café, brunch spot, and all-day dining destination on the River Esplanade in Docklands, Melbourne, offering specialty coffee, creative breakfast and lunch dishes, and an evening wine bar & grill with marina and city skyline views.

Docklands cafe with waterfront views

Start your day with expertly roasted Zest Coffee—our house Blackbird espresso blend or seasonal single origins—paired with signature smashed avocado on sourdough with salsa verde and pickled chilli, acai bowls, pan-seared Atlantic salmon, ricotta hotcakes, or classic eggs benedict. Whether you're after a quick flat white, relaxed brunch with friends, or business lunch overlooking the water, our riverside setting and fresh, seasonal menu deliver Melbourne's best café experience in Docklands.

Evening wine bar & grill

As the sun sets, transition to dinner: share small plates like porcini arancini or soft shell crab tacos, then enjoy larger mains including Cape Grim eye fillet with béarnaise, roast chicken breast, linguine with swimmer crab and prawns, or moules-frites. Sides feature duck fat potatoes and charred greens with Meredith goats cheese, while desserts—tonka crème brûlée or affogato—round out the meal alongside our curated Australian wines and craft cocktails.

A venue for all occasions

Open daily for brunch and coffee, Wednesday–Saturday for dinner. Ideal for Docklands locals, waterfront visitors, and anyone seeking quality café coffee, brunch, lunch, or dinner with views in Melbourne's Docklands. Book now or walk in—your table awaits.

Book your table now
Looking for Melbourne brunch and specialty coffee with marina views? You’ve found it - Book Your Table at The Espressonist

The Espressonist is Docklands’ premier waterfront café and brunch restaurant, open 7 days a week at 108 River Esplanade. We serve expertly roasted Zest coffee (Blackbird espresso blend + rotating single origins) alongside creative all-day brunch favourites: signature smashed avocado with salsa verde and pickled chilli, lush acai bowls, pan-seared Atlantic salmon, chorizo hash benedict, and soft shell crab tacos.

Every table comes with panoramic Yarra River marina views and the Melbourne CBD skyline as your backdrop—perfect for a quick coffee, relaxed brunch with friends, business lunch, or weekend catch-up.

ABOUT

Grey & Bliss – Bay Street’s Favourite Café & Dining Spot in Port Melbourne

Located right on Bay Street, Port Melbourne, Grey & Bliss has become a beloved local hotspot for specialty coffee, all-day breakfast and gourmet lunches. Whether you're here for a Five Senses coffee, our famous avocado smash, eggs benedict collection, or the indulgent blueberry & ricotta hotcakes, every dish is crafted with fresh, high-quality ingredients.

Lunch in Port Melbourne just got tastier with our crowd-pleasing char-grilled Portuguese chicken and 100% Wagyu double cheese burger. For something lighter, our vibrant salad bowls pack a flavour punch that’ll leave you craving more. Plus, with rotating seasonal specials, there’s always something new to try!

Thirsty? Sip on fresh smoothies, cold-pressed juices, or creamy milkshakes by day, then unwind after dark with local craft beers, imported wines, and signature cocktails. Pair your drinks with shareable bites or hearty meals—perfect for relaxed day on Bay Street.

ASSEMBLY BLEND - COFFEE ROASTED FOR ESPRESSO from $22.00

Medium-bodied with milk chocolate & dried fruit. Pairs perfectly with milk.

Region: 50% Colombia, Balboa & 50% Brazil, Anahy
Process: Washed & natural
Varietals: Castillo, caturra, acaia 

This seasonal espresso blend combines two fresh, new-season coffees from Colombia and Brazil. Each component is roasted individually to preserve its best character, then blended to create a consistent, versatile espresso that prioritises balance, sweetness and structure. The Assembly Blend works seamlessly with milk while remaining clear and expressive as a straight espresso.

This iteration brings together two dependable, high-performing origins in equal measure: 50% Balboa Regional Plus from Cauca, Colombia, and 50% Anahy from the south of Minas Gerais, Brazil. Rather than chasing novelty, the blend is built around structure, sweetness, and consistency — coffees selected for clarity of process and reliability of profile. Together they form a balanced foundation: Colombia providing lift and definition, Brazil offering depth and warmth.

Balboa Regional Plus represents a higher-tier regional offering, sourced from well-managed farms and quality-driven producer groups in Cauca. Grown at altitude and carefully processed, the coffee undergoes pulping followed by a controlled dry anaerobic fermentation of around 20 hours before slow drying in parabolic dryers to preserve stability and longevity. The result is a clean, structured cup marked by caramel sweetness, raisin depth, orange brightness, and a soft pear-like acidity. It contributes precision and gentle fruit clarity to the blend without overt ferment character.

Anahy, meaning “sweet voice” in the Tupi-Guarani language, is a natural-processed coffee grown by small scale producers in South Minas Gerais at around 1,050 metres above sea level. The region’s fertile soils, abundant sunlight, and high elevations are well known for producing coffees with chocolate and nut foundations and an easy, balanced sweetness. In the blend, Anahy anchors the profile with cocoa richness and rounded body, smoothing the brighter edges of the Colombian component. The finished cup is composed and generous: milk chocolate and toasted nuts layered with caramelised citrus and subtle dried fruit, finishing clean, sweet, and quietly assured.

Choose whole beans or ground to your preference - select your grind option after adding to cart.

Roasted for espresso by Assembly in North Melbourne.

ESPRO PRESS P6 FRENCH PRESS COFFEE MAKER – 945 ML $165.00

The Espro Press P6 is a premium stainless steel French press designed to brew smooth, grit-free coffee that stays hot for longer. Made with double walled stainless steel, it holds heat efficiently while the dual micro filter system delivers a cleaner, richer cup every time. Unlike standard French presses, the Espro P6 uses a double micro filter with a silicone seal that fits tightly against the inner wall. This creates a vacuum seal and stops extraction when you press the plunger, so your coffee tastes consistent from the first pour to the last. It’s made beautifully for everyday use. The Espro Press P6 features a locking handle for easy cleaning and an insulated lid to help keep your coffee warm. Durable, practical, and thoughtfully designed, it’s a French press you’ll reach for daily.

279-west-melbourne:
Our menu features a unique take on Japanese Musubi, with flavour combinations designed to reflect traditional Japanese food and some with a touch of ‘Aussie’. We also feature regularly rotating coffee roasts, highlighting blends from local and international roasters that are sure to keep your taste buds satisfied and your coffee affair blooming.
Musubi, also known as onigiri, is the Japanese equivalent of a classic Aussie sandwich. A triangle of rice with a filling or topping wrapped up in a piece of nori, the perfect lunch or on-the-go snack, and oso-zai are a selection of Japanese style veggie sides that pair perfectly with our musubi.

And yes, we’re the place with the mochinuts.

At 279, we specialise in coffee, Japanese tea and Musubi, creating a café experience like no other in Melbourne. Our menu is a successful blending of traditional Japanese elements with Melbourne café culture, the experience tied together with a clean and crisp aesthetic featuring local design and craftwork.  

Located in a freshly renovated corner building on Victoria Street, West Melbourne. We value good vibes, great food and incredible coffee, and are honoured to be providing locals with a unique ‘Japan X Melbourne’ experience, in a relaxed yet energetic environment.  

Curious about our name? 279 was chosen because of its neutrality, giving both the food and coffee a chance to equally shine and knock your socks off when you enter the space. Plus, we figured it would be a handy way to remember where we are, given that it’s our address!

emerald-hill-cafe-south-melbourne:
CAFE AND CATERING
Emerald Hill Cafe South Melbourne

Emerald Hill Cafe serve fresh and tasty "healthy home style" food with plenty of excellent take-away selections available to choose from in the cafe. We also provide local businesses with a corporate catering service, including local delivery and an online ordering system for quick and easy ordering.

Located in the heart of South Melbourne within the Emerald Hill district, the Emerald Hill Café has evolved over the past 30 years to become a local institution known for its quality fresh food and hospitality. Taking ownership of the Emerald Hill Café in 2013, Alex and Katerina brought a fresh approach; drawing on their decades of experience within the hospitality industry, their aim was to provide a warm and inviting environment for the local community to come together and share in their passion for great coffee and food. Alex and Katina quickly built a strong reputation in the area which allowed them to expand their offering and extend their reach beyond the local community to become respected caterers for both private and corporate functions across all of Melbourne. In 2022, the building where the Emerald Hill Café lived for so many years was sold, and Alex and Katina moved the cafe to its new home in Clarendon Street. They welcome everyone to be part of the next chapter of the Emerald Hill Café within the bustling South Melbourne district.

 

READ MORE

OUR MENU
Emerald Hill Cafe Menu

Emerald Hill Cafe are all about serving healthy, home style meal options to cater for a wide variety of tastes and dietary preferences. All our meals are prepared in-house with the freshest of ingredients and can be eaten in our cafe or packaged up for you to take-away. We also offer a catering delivery service for local businesses, or we can even deliver your dinner to home if you live in the nearby area.

BREAKFAST MENU

A selection of wholesome savoury or sweet breakfast selections available ranging from muesli and yogurt cups to muffins, danishes and scones. A variety of vegetarian and gluten free options are available on the menu.

READ MORE
SNACKS MENU

A selection of wholesome savoury or sweet snacks available ranging from muffins and danishes to freshly cooked toasted sandwiches. A variety of gluten free and vegetarian selections are available on the menu.

READ MORE
FINGER FOOD MENU

A selection of wholesome savoury or sweet finger food selections ranging from mini hamburgers and frittata squares to rice paper rolls and pillow sandwiches. A variety of gluten free and vegetarian selections available.

READ MORE
PLATTERS MENU

A selection of wholesome savoury or sweet platters ranging from fruit platters, cheese and cracker platters to antipasto platters. Vegetarian options available and any special dietary requirements can be accommodated.

READ MORE
SALADS MENU

A selection of wholesome salads in large or small serving sizes with both vegetarian and gluten free options available. Freshly made every day in-house, our salads are a healthy and delicious lunch or snack option.

READ MORE
BAGUETTES & WRAPS MENU

A selection of wholesome baguettes, wraps and sandwiches served on sourdough with vegetarian and gluten free options available. Point sandwiches are available for those hosting a function.

READ MORE
DRINKS MENU

A variety of bottled and canned drinks are available on the menu. Options range from soft-drink to juice and mineral water. They can be purchased in idividual sizes or in larger bottles for those hosting an event.

READ MORE
CAKES MENU

A selection of delicious cakes and slices available on the Emerald Hill menu. Ranging in size from 21cm cakes serving up to 10 people, through to large slab cakes that can be cut into up to 63 pieces for a larger function.

READ MORE
DINNER MENU

Emerald Hill Cafe can provide catering for dinner, upon request. Our dinners can be put together from any of our delicious options on our menu. Dinners are quoted per event and can be arranged by contacting the cafe.

READ MORE

plenary-caf-south-wharf:
Plan your visit
Home
|
Plan your visit

Our venue is the perfect place to share ideas, celebrate milestones, and dive into unique experiences in the heart of Melbourne. Feel the city's vibrant energy in every moment as you discover the next big thing and join conversations that shape the future. With our visitor information, you'll have everything you need to make the most of your time at MCEC, leaving you buzzing with inspiration and excitement!

Download the venue map [0.5mb]
Getting to MCEC
Find your way in
By car
By train
By tram
By bus
By bicycle
By taxi or rideshare
From the airport

Planning your travel? We've got all the options covered.

For events at the Exhibition Centre, head to our Clarendon Street entrance. If you're heading to the Convention Centre, make your way to Convention Centre Place, between Pan Pacific Melbourne and DFO South Wharf.

A
Exhibition Centre entrance
B
Convention Centre entrance
Our venue
ATMs: Cashless convenience
Charging stations
Mobility Aid Charging Stations
Cloak room
Changing Places
Parents room
Prayer room
Wifi

Welcome to our cash-free zone! Please use electronic payment methods when inside the venue.

Need cash? ATMs are conveniently located on the concourse of Melbourne Exhibition Centre near Door 4.

Accessibility

We are continually working to create a more inclusive event experience for all our visitors. If you have any feedback or concerns related to accessibility at MCEC, please feel free to reach out to us via email enquiries@mcec.com.au.

Accessible Tourism Accreditation
Service animals

BINS4Blokes

Learn more
Coffee, food and drink

Craving a quick bite? Look no further than our cafes and bars, where you'll find fresh, in-house-made snacks and meals crafted from premium, locally sourced ingredients. And for the coffee lovers! We're excited to welcome Padre Coffee to our cafes!

Goldfields Café + Bar

A stylish haven to refresh and relax—perfect for catching up or unwinding solo. Enjoy Padre Coffee, house-made pastries, all-day dining, and wine by the glass. Something for everyone, anytime you need a break.

Open from 7.30am daily | Ideal for guests attending events between Exhibition Centre Doors 6 - 21

The Courtyard Bar

Your inner-city summer oasis, here for a limited time. An open-air place to slow down, grab a drink and enjoy the best part of the day, Come for the sunshine. Stay for the cocktails. Brag about the cannoli. Find us next to Goldfields Café.

Open Fridays, Saturdays and Sundays from 1:30pm.

Shed Café

Perfect for a quick Padre Coffee and cake. Grab a treat on your way in or enjoy the Yarra River/Birrarung view. Indulge in house-made pastries, fresh salads, and sandwiches.

Open based on event demand | Ideal for guests attending events between Exhibition Centre Doors 1 - 10

Plenary Lounge

A trendy spot to boost your energy or relax between meetings. Ideal for sipping coffee and firing off emails mid-conference. Enjoy homemade jaffles, toasties, salads, and wraps.

Open based on event demand | Ideal for guests attending events located in the Convention Centre

Accommodation

Stay close, stay connected. From upscale luxury to boutique charm or the ease of serviced apartments, we’ve got accommodation options to match your style.

Stay onsite at Pacific Melbourne or Novotel Melbourne South Wharf. Keep it local with our precinct hotels just moments from MCEC, or for that city buzz, explore our picks in Melbourne’s lively centre—each offering a unique way to experience the city's vibrant energy.

Find the perfect place to stay
Discover more
Experience Melbourne

There’s just something about this city! As Australia’s capital of culture, creativity, pulse-racing sports, and cutting-edge ideas, Melbourne is bursting with unbeatable energy and diverse cultures. Festivals and celebrations here are globally recognised, and to local Melburnians, it’s a foodie paradise and the undisputed coffee capital of Australia.

What's on

Ever had that feeling where all you can do is try to relive the incredible experience you just had? That's what we create here. Ideas are born, debated, and shared in our space, sparking creativity and innovation. You’ve come to the right place. Browse our upcoming events here and book your next experience.

Virtual tours

Heading to our venue? Curious about the layout, where your event space is, or the nearest café? With our user-friendly 360° virtual tours, you can explore and navigate our iconic spaces before you even arrive. Get familiar with everything from the entrance to the event areas in no time!

protagonist-southbank:
Menu
Help unleash children’s wild imaginations

Eat & Drink
Protagonist

Much like the name suggests, Protagonist plays a lead role in creating a distinctive and memorable impression at Arts Centre Melbourne.

Protagonist is defined by striking architectural mesh, akin to a bronze curtain that is raised as the café opens in the morning and then lowered at night to signify end of service. Popular for your morning coffee fix, Protagonist serves up custom coffee blends and breakfast options including our popular jaffles and toasties.

Choose from freshly baked cakes and biscuits, for lunch options include sandwiches, wraps, salads and savoury pastries which you can enjoy in the open-air surrounds on the forecourt. Or perhaps gather some gourmet treats for a picnic in the nearby Queen Victoria Gardens.

Arts Centre Melbourne is a cashless venue accepting credit or debit card payments.

At the heart of South Melbourne, our cozy cafe is more than just a place to grab a coffee—it's a warm and welcoming space where community comes first. We serve delicious coffee, comforting brunch, and a curated selection of beautiful plants to brighten your day and your home.

Our goal is simple: to offer a little pocket of happiness in your daily routine.

With friendly faces, heartfelt service, and prices that won’t break the bank, we aim to make every visit feel like coming home. Whether you're here for a quiet cup, a catch-up with friends, or to find the perfect leafy companion, you’re always welcome.

Come for the coffee. Stay for the vibes.

Why Koko Black?
Support Sustainability

We are supporting 100% sustainably sourced cocoa. It means our chocolate doesn’t just taste incredible, it does incredible things too.

100% Natural

Handcrafted with only the good stuff. At Koko Black, we keep our chocolates free of artificial additives, colours and preservatives.

Giving Back

We believe in giving back to the place that made us, and celebrating the flavours of home. We’re proud of our home, and we want to give back to it – and not just in chocolate form.

Proudly Australian

At Koko Black, we’re celebrating the very best Australia has to offer. Native Ingredients and Superfoods now reimagined in chocolate to rediscover the real tastes of home.

bloomwood-melbourne:
Bloomwood
Discover Bloomwood, Melbourne's fusion café at 121 Exhibition St, offering artisanal pastries and innovative drinks in a serene Japandi-inspired setting.
Make a Reservation Now View Menu
Welcome to Bloomwood

Welcome to Bloomwood, your elegant dining escape nestled in the heart of Melbourne at Shop G01/121 Exhibition Street. Whether you're here for a leisurely brunch, a stylish dinner, or simply a relaxing drink, Bloomwood invites you to experience a warm ambiance, exceptional service, and thoughtfully crafted dishes that celebrate fresh, local ingredients. Step inside and let us treat you to a memorable culinary journey in one of the city's most vibrant locations.

Contact Us

Phone Number: 0430 681 977

Address: shop G01/121 Exhibition St, Melbourne VIC 3000

 Opening hours

Monday: 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM

Tuesday: 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM

Wednesday: 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM

Thursday: 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM

Friday: 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM

Saturday: 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM

Sunday: 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM

Bloomwood Menu
 
Full Menu
Bloomwood Photos
 
Our Story

Bloomwood was born from a shared vision among founders Brian Taing, Joe La, and Darren Nguyen to blend the elegance of French viennoiserie with the rich tapestry of Asian flavors. Drawing inspiration from their cultural heritage, they sought to create a space where traditional baking techniques meet innovative flavor profiles, offering patrons a unique and memorable culinary experience.

A Culinary Fusion in the Heart of Melbourne

Nestled in the bustling Melbourne CBD at Shop G01/121 Exhibition Street, Bloomwood stands as a testament to culinary innovation. This café and bakehouse has quickly become a favorite among locals and visitors alike, renowned for its artisanal pastries and inventive beverages.

The menu boasts a delightful array of pastries that marry classic French techniques with Asian-inspired flavors. Signature items include the Corn Cheese Danish, a nod to Korean street food, featuring creamy béchamel and sweet corn atop flaky pastry. The Taro Flower Danish is another standout, combining coconut cream jelly with ube mascarpone for a visually stunning and delectable treat. 

For those seeking savory options, Bloomwood offers Focaccia Pizza Slices with toppings like pepperoni drizzled with hot honey and truffle mushroom paired with stracciatella. These offerings cater to the lunchtime crowd, providing hearty and satisfying choices. 

Beverage enthusiasts will appreciate the café's inventive drink menu. The Strawberry Iced Matcha and Coconut Iced Matcha are refreshing takes on traditional matcha lattes, while the Citrus Cream Brew offers a zesty twist. For a unique experience, patrons can opt for the Bloomtini, a whimsical concoction featuring three mini croissants skewered atop their drink of choice. 

The ambiance at Bloomwood is equally captivating. Designed by Hacsan Design, the interior showcases Japandi aesthetics, characterized by light timber paneling, circular paper lanterns, and custom noren curtains. This serene setting provides a tranquil escape from the city's hustle and bustle.

Coffee, food and drink

Craving a quick bite? Look no further than our cafes and bars, where you'll find fresh, in-house-made snacks and meals crafted from premium, locally sourced ingredients. And for the coffee lovers! We're excited to welcome Padre Coffee to our cafes!

Goldfields Café + Bar

A stylish haven to refresh and relax—perfect for catching up or unwinding solo. Enjoy Padre Coffee, house-made pastries, all-day dining, and wine by the glass. Something for everyone, anytime you need a break.

Open from 7.30am daily | Ideal for guests attending events between Exhibition Centre Doors 6 - 21

The Courtyard Bar

Your inner-city summer oasis, here for a limited time. An open-air place to slow down, grab a drink and enjoy the best part of the day, Come for the sunshine. Stay for the cocktails. Brag about the cannoli. Find us next to Goldfields Café.

Open Fridays, Saturdays and Sundays from 1:30pm.

Shed Café

Perfect for a quick Padre Coffee and cake. Grab a treat on your way in or enjoy the Yarra River/Birrarung view. Indulge in house-made pastries, fresh salads, and sandwiches.

Open based on event demand | Ideal for guests attending events between Exhibition Centre Doors 1 - 10

Plenary Lounge

A trendy spot to boost your energy or relax between meetings. Ideal for sipping coffee and firing off emails mid-conference. Enjoy homemade jaffles, toasties, salads, and wraps.

Open based on event demand | Ideal for guests attending events located in the Convention Centre

Accommodation

Stay close, stay connected. From upscale luxury to boutique charm or the ease of serviced apartments, we’ve got accommodation options to match your style.

Stay onsite at Pacific Melbourne or Novotel Melbourne South Wharf. Keep it local with our precinct hotels just moments from MCEC, or for that city buzz, explore our picks in Melbourne’s lively centre—each offering a unique way to experience the city's vibrant energy.

Experience Melbourne

There’s just something about this city! As Australia’s capital of culture, creativity, pulse-racing sports, and cutting-edge ideas, Melbourne is bursting with unbeatable energy and diverse cultures. Festivals and celebrations here are globally recognised, and to local Melburnians, it’s a foodie paradise and the undisputed coffee capital of Australia.

What's on

Ever had that feeling where all you can do is try to relive the incredible experience you just had? That's what we create here. Ideas are born, debated, and shared in our space, sparking creativity and innovation. You’ve come to the right place. Browse our upcoming events here and book your next experience.

Virtual tours

Heading to our venue? Curious about the layout, where your event space is, or the nearest café? With our user-friendly 360° virtual tours, you can explore and navigate our iconic spaces before you even arrive. Get familiar with everything from the entrance to the event areas in no time!

Henry and The Fox
Restaurant | Bar | Cafe | Functions
525 Little Collins Street, Melbourne

Located at 525 Little Collins Street in the vibrant end of Melbourne’s CBD, Henry and the Fox is a modern restaurant, bar and cafe boasting great food, friendly service and atmosphere that blends seamlessly with the local vibe and is perfect for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

Our venue has become an iconic dining destination in Melbourne cherished not only by tenants of 500 Collins but also by locals and visitors to our city alike. Our blend of modern flavours and inviting atmosphere encapsulate the spirit of Melbourne hospitality.

Join us to find out why we are celebrated landmark in Melbourne’s bustling food scene.

RESERVATIONS
Eat

Our menu is a delightful fusion of Modern-Australian cuisine with a European touch, drawing significant inspiration from French, Italian and European traditions. Enjoy breakfast, lunch and dinner at Henry and the Fox. Each dish is a testament to our dedication to freshness, quality, and inventive culinary artistry. With a focus on contemporary Australian dining infused with European flair, our menu brings a world of flavours right to your plate, celebrating the best of both worlds.

FOOD MENU
Drink

Our drinks selection is a key part of our venu. Renowned for our barista-made Allpress espresso coffee, quality refreshing tap beers, a curated selection of Australian and international wines plus an inventive array of classic and signature cocktails, we cater to all tastes and moods, especially pleasing our beloved locals and visitors alike.

Modern Coffee. Made Simple

At Blume, we believe the best things in life aren’t rushed. That’s why we take care at every step—from sourcing to roasting—to bring out the best in all our coffees.

We roast fresh, pack fresh, and send it straight to you, so you can brew, sip, and savour. No fuss. 

Just good coffee, made simple.

Everyday, Seasonal Coffee

BLUME CORE RANGE

QUICK VIEW
Sunshine from $20.00

Consider this our signature coffee. Sometimes a blend, sometimes not. Always designed to be balanced, sweet and textural. Roasted for Espresso but enjoyed with milk, or without. There are no hard and fast rules with this one - brew for filter, french press, batch brewer, stovetop. Hell, even a saucepan if you like. You do you, boo.

Twilight, Half Caff, Colombia from $20.00

Mild · Cherry · Caramel · Hazelnut

Half the caffeine, all of the tasty.

A very gentle little nudge through bleary eyes, that extra push to the finish line, or simply more cups in a day. Kind of a blend but absolutely not—this is made up of two coffees from the same producer group in the northern hills of Cauca, Colombia.

Sourced from the Páez people of San Antonio, we have selected both a washed processed coffee as well as an Ethyl Acetate (EA) decaf. 

50% caffeinated, 50% decaffeinated. This is as pure to a place as a half-caff could be. 

The EA process decaffeinates coffee using only natural Ethyl Acetate—think alcohol and the acid in vinegar, steam, and water. No nasty chemicals. 

The washed process removes all of the fruit from the outside of the bean before drying, leaving us only what plant, place, and farmer have created.

The producers of San Antonio belong to one of Colombia's largest indigenous groups, the Páez. Historically, this region was under the control of the FARC, a notoriously violent rebel group that funded itself via drug trafficking, kidnapping, and extortion. The area began to stabilize around 2012, followed by a peace deal with the Colombian government being penned in 2016. As a result, these producers are now able to offer their coffees to the international market, and we couldn't be more grateful. Simple, delicious, and good. A hug in a mug, more often.

Decaf, Colombia, EA from $20.00

Mild · Apricot · Caramel · Chocolate

Not everyone wants a morning pick-me-up, maybe just a little comfort or a warm hug in a mug.

Gone are the days of looking down on decaf. Let's put it on the pedestal it deserves. 

Sweet, unctuous, warming, and gentle, a great cup of decaf is a welcome addition to any time of day.

We have selected a beautiful coffee from San Antonio in Cauca. The coffee was decaffeinated using a process called Ethyl Acetate (EA). Sounds like nasty chemicals, but it is purely alcohol and the acid found in vinegar. Not only free of nasties, this solvent removes only the caffeine, leaving all the tastiness of plant, soil, and toil behind.

The producers of San Antonio belong to one of Colombia's largest indigenous groups, the Páez. Historically, this region was under the control of the FARC, a notoriously violent rebel group that funded itself via drug trafficking, kidnapping, and extortion. The area began to stabilize around 2012, followed by a peace deal with the Colombian government being penned in 2016. As a result, these producers are now able to offer their coffees to the international market, and we couldn't be more grateful. Simple, delicious, and good. A hug in a mug, without the jitters.

petite-by-matilda-mont-albert-north:
High Tea Experience at Matilda

Celebrate Mother’s Day with High Tea at Matilda. This Mother’s Day, join us for a heartwarming High Tea experience designed to honour the love and care of all the special women in our lives. Whether thats our mums, grandmas, aunties, carers, and anyone who holds that nurturing role, including those celebrating themselves. Enjoy a beautifully curated selection of teas, barista-made coffee, petite champagne, cakes, and savoury treats — all lovingly prepared to make this a truly memorable moment.

Book Now
Skip to product information
Open media 1 in modal
Mothers Day ~ Breakfast In Bed Boxes

Our beautifully curated breakfast in bed box is designed to bring a little indulgence, warmth, and love to their morning. Each box is thoughtfully prepared with a selection of our favourite treats: a buttery croissant served with house-made raspberry jam and cultured butter, a petite overnight oats, a delicate mini frittata, a limited edition loco love chocolate, and a soothing organic love tea teabag, everything needed for a slow, comforting start to the day. Every box also includes a Mother’s Day card for you to customise with your own heartfelt message. The perfect way to bring that Matilda experience to them.

Regular price

aunt-billies-cafe-blackburn:
Aunt Billie's Cafe - Blackburn's Hidden Gem

Blackburn's Hidden Gem

Welcome to our cozy neighborhood cafe, where we serve delicious breakfast, brunch, and lunch made with love and the freshest local ingredients.

View Our Menu
Book a Table
Welcome to Aunt Billie's

At Aunt Billie's, we take care in making your cup of specialty coffee, whether that be a cold drip or just your classic latte, because we all know how important the first coffee of the day is. Our food is exceptional with a dash of middle eastern influence. Our signature dish and must try is our Mediterranean Breakfast. We are family oriented and love all of our customers. Come visit and say hello, we have something for everyone.

Relax in our beautiful outdoor seating area surrounded by lush greenery, or enjoy the cozy ambiance inside. We're proud to be pet-friendly, so bring your furry friends along! Whether you're starting your day with a perfectly crafted coffee, enjoying our signature breakfast dishes, or grabbing a quick lunch, we're here to make every visit memorable.

milkwine-co-heathmont:
backtotop
milk+wine co.
OUR CAFE + WINE BAR
Atmosphere that
matches the food and
wine offering

We believe in using fresh, locally sourced ingredients in all of our breakfast, brunch and lunch dishes. While our seasonal menu is stacked with lots of healthy options, we have also included a touch of the ‘American vibe’ with dishes like our Eggs Benedict with chipotle hollandaise and smoked brisket. There will always be something a bit unique that pushes the boundaries on our specials board too for those who like to try something new! We bake all our cakes, muffins and snack items in house and we also offer a wide range of sandwiches, salads and bagels for those people on the go.

Local fresh cuisine
for everyone

Milk+Wine Co. is a family-run business offering local knowledge and hospitality. Run by homegrown Heathmont lovers, the owners recognise the importance of community; giving Heathmont back a place for locals to call home.

 

Milk+Wine Co. has taken over the location of the iconic cafe formally known as Barclays, and are offering a contemporary menu and atmosphere complemented with exceptional customer service.

our menu
Our All-Day Menu
Our Drinks Menu
PIF
contact us
Say hello!

196–198 Canterbury Road, Heathmont 3135 

hello@milkandwine.com.au 

p:  03 8719 8877

​

Opening Hours

Monday - Friday 7am-3:00pm

Saturday 7:30am-3:00pm

Sunday 7:30am-2:00pm

Book a Table
Pay it Forward

In a time where there is a lot of bad news and families are suffering in ways they have not before, the team at Milk+Wine Co. are getting behind the community and trying to make a difference and have therefore, implemented our ‘Pay it Forward’ Program.

 

What does this mean? Customers and businesses have been buying our $35 family meals and we are donating these meals to the people in our community who need them most. These are people who have lost their jobs, financially they are struggling, mentally are not coping with everything that is going on or, someone who just needs a night off and a smile on their face. 

 

We have donated over 1000 meals to date, have held days specifically dedicated to our healthcare, emergency and essential workers and we are working with groups like the Baptist Church and district nursing services to provide meals to the most vulnerable people in our community.

 

So, how can you get behind it? You could purchase a meal at the café or online, you could nominate someone you know who could benefit from one of these meals via our Facebook or Instagram pages or via email hello@milkandwine.com.au.

 

We are looking to help the people who need it most right now and while we cannot promise the world, we can promise we will do what we can.

​

posie-project-montrose:
CAFE · BOUTIQUE · COMMUNITY

Welcome to
Posie Project.

A charming little corner in the heart of Montrose — where warm cups, sweet treats and beautiful handmade creations come together under one pink roof.

See the Menu
Find Us
Coffee
Food
Gifts
a little of everything
Three things we love most

Come for the coffee, stay for the treats, leave with something beautiful from our hand-picked boutique.

Good Coffee

Every cup made with care — lattes, flat whites, chai, mochas, iced everything, and yes, a babychino for the little ones (and a puppachino for the four-legged friends).

Honest Food

Toasties, paninis, fresh croissants, house-made cakes, muffins, cabinet sweets and ice-cream — the kind of menu that makes everyone smile.

Beautiful Finds

A curated boutique of treasures hand-picked by Lan — jewellery, candles, kids clothes, home pieces and gifts you won’t find anywhere else.

our little corner
A cafe with a community at its heart.

Posie Project began as a dream to build somewhere warm, welcoming and beautiful — a space that feels like someone’s lounge room, where neighbours become friends and the shelves are full of treasures waiting to be found.

We pour coffee for the morning walkers, decorate cakes for birthdays, and wrap up gifts hand-picked from our boutique shelves. It’s a cafe. It’s a boutique. It’s ours — and it’s yours.

Read Our Story
the boutique
Treasures from our boutique

Every piece on our shelves has been hand-picked by Lan herself. When you shop with us, you’re taking home something chosen with care, just for the boutique.

Explore the Boutique

KIND WORDS

what people say
Real reviews from our Montrose locals.
★★★★★
Super cute place — the owners on hand are simply gorgeous humans. Food is basic rolls and toasties but deliciously prepared and presented. Fabulous coffees and very reasonably priced. They also stock a great range of giftware at great prices, supporting local biz. Well done. This will be my go-to place whenever I’m in the area.
★★★★★
A little cafe easily missed off the busy highway. Perfect coffee and hot chocolate with all the milk options. There was a variety of baked goods and sandwiches.
★★★★★
Only came for coffee and a muffin — it was nice. Inside is really cute with pastel colours, decor and shop. Owner is very friendly. Hot chocolate is lovely with a good amount of sweetness. Lovely children’s seats and tables outside. Would love to come back again.
★★★★★
Gorgeous cafe with quirky gifts for sale. Lovely staff and excellent coffee. A bright and inviting cafe with a lovely choice of food to choose from. Definitely worthwhile visiting when in the Dandenongs around the Montrose vicinity.
★★★★★
Delicious coffee and food. Friendly relaxed atmosphere where spending time reading or using a laptop is comfortable. Unusual locally made cards and gifts available.
★★★★★
Sweet cafe and store, good vibes and happy times. A nice place to stop by for a pause or a chat. The family running this place are super lovely and community minded.
