dumbo-west-footscray:
Dumbo Melbourne — Specialty Coffee & All-Day Brunch in West Footscray

Welcome to Dumbo Melbourne — a beloved specialty coffee cafe and all-day brunch destination in the heart of West Footscray (WeFo). 

Since 2016, we've been serving expertly crafted espresso, single origin pour overs, and a multicultural menu inspired by global flavours. Whether you're craving smashed avo toast, eggs benedict, or our famous Arroz Caldo, Dumbo is your local spot for great food, great coffee, and great company.

Buy Gift Voucher
Reservation
Shop Merchandise
Our Selves

Located in the vibrant suburb of West Footscray, Dumbo Melbourne is a must-visit destination for coffee lovers and foodies alike. 

We source high-quality, ethically sourced coffee beans that are used to create some of the best coffee in Melbourne. The cafe serves a range of espresso-based drinks, filter coffee, and cold brew, all of which are expertly crafted by the skilled baristas

The multicultural menu is another highlight of the cafe. With a range of dishes inspired by different cuisines from around the world, there's always something new and exciting to try

The interior design of Dumbo Melbourne is bright, airy, and minimalist, creating a sense of calm and tranquility that is perfect for relaxing with a cup of coffee or enjoying a meal with friends.

At Dumbo Melbourne, we believe in giving back to the community that has supported us since we first opened our doors. We care deeply about the West Footscray (Wefo) community and strive to be an active participant in its growth and development

Feedback

At Dumbo, we are committed to providing our customers with the best possible service and products. That's why we would love to hear your feedback!

If you have a few minutes, we would greatly appreciate it if you could take a moment to complete below feedback form.

 We want to know what you liked about your thoughts and where we can improve. 

Your feedback is incredibly important to us and will help us to create an even better cafe.

From Blends to Brew Gear

Melbourne's Best Specialty Coffee

Knock-out blends and world class single origins. Bold espressos and flavour filled filter roasts. All sustainably and transparently sourced, so you can feel great about your coffee, knowing it's supporting farmers and their communities.

Blends
Subscriptions
Brew Gear
What's New
The Rumble Beginning

Matt and Joe began Rumble Coffee with a desire to shake up the coffee industry, whilst focusing on three core ingredients; roasting the best coffee Melbourne has to offer, establishing ongoing relationships with coffee farmers, and doing so with an unwavering commitment to doing the right thing by the planet and the people on it.

Our tight-knit team is united by a common goal of creating a sustainable future for coffee, where everyone in the supply chain is paid fairly, and coffees are sourced with integrity and transparency.

Rumble is a certified B-Corporation.

Read More
Brewing a Better Future

We reckon it's more important than ever to be looking after the planet and the people on it, so we have a no-bullshit policy when it comes to sustainability and transparency.

Rumble is a certified B-Corp. We also publish what we pay for each coffee, so you can feel great about your coffee, knowing it's supporting farmers and their communities.

Learn More

Specialty Coffee in Melbourne

Bold blends. Outstanding single origins. Roasted right here in Melbourne.

At Rumble, we’re more than just specialty coffee roasters – we’re a tight-knit team with a deep passion for ethically sourced coffee that punches well above its weight. From bold espressos to flavour-packed filter roasts, every bean we roast is a product of care, transparency, and a genuine love for coffee....

Whether you're a die-hard espresso drinker or a weekend V60 brewer, we’ve got something that’ll hit the spot. We're the Melbourne coffee roaster that brings it all together – top-tier beans, transparent sourcing, and a commitment to building a better future for coffee. It’s time to Drink Better Coffee. 

Your Local Coffee Suppliers

As premium coffee roasters and a certified B-Corp, our focus is on roasting exceptional coffee that supports farmers and empowers communities. 

Every bag we ship has a story – and it starts at the farm. We publish what we pay for each coffee so you can feel good about every cup.

Looking for a coffee roaster company that walks the talk? You’re in the right place.

Specialty Coffee Delivery across Melbourne

Craving your Rumble fix? Our speciality coffee delivery service means you can get your favourite blends and single origins sent straight to your doorstep, anywhere in Australia. 

Whether you’re topping up your office stash or stocking the pantry at home, we’ve got your coffee delivery covered with our subscription service. 

Freshly roasted. Sustainably sourced. Delivered fast.

Wholesale Coffee Bean Roaster

Running a cafe? We work with venues all over Australia that want to deliver a “coffee-first” experience to their customers. 

As one of the leading coffee suppliers in Melbourne, we bring more than beans to the table – we offer expert support, training, equipment advice, and an unbeatable partnership.

With Rumble as your wholesale coffee bean roaster, you’re not just buying bulk beans. You’re joining a team that’s obsessed with your success.

Why Choose Rumble as Your Coffee Suppliers?

 

Locally roasted: Based in Kensington, we’re proud to be one of the top specialty coffee roasters in Melbourne.

fledgling-espresso-carlton-north:
WARM AND COZY

Your neighbourhood favourite

Our dream was to have a small café, loved by locals and this is exactly what Fledgling is, a place where everyone knows your name.

Open Monday to Friday 6am-3pm

Weekends 8am-3pm

Public Holidays 8am-2pm

POWERED BY INGLEWOOD

Great Coffee

When you savor a cup of our coffee, know that it's not just a beverage; it's a labor of love.

It's the dedication of our team, the expertise of local roaster Inglewood Coffee, and milk from Riverina Fresh, that make it one of the best cups you'll ever taste.

Definitely worth the wait!

MENU

Classics with a twist

The menu is simple, classics with a twist, ALWAYS fresh and always from scratch by our fabulous kitchen team.

We love to support local small suppliers like Greenlands and Brioche by Publique Bakery.

From savoury classics, like perfectly cooked egg in our bacon and egg roll, to the Melbourne staple smashed avo.

And then there are the sweets. Ready for a slice of pure joy? We're talkin' carrot cake so good, it's basically a vegetable conspiracy. Made fresh in our cafe, it's the sweetest way to sneak some veggies into your life.

Come for the coffee, stay for the carrot caper!

Whole cakes 24- 72 hours notice

This is the exciting bit of Green Refectory. The cakes. We make these homemade cakes to order for birthdays, events, work, catering, morning tea with friends or school lunches. We do require 24 hours - 72 hours notice to complete your cake order depending what cake your order. We also ask that you complete the date and time for collection and we will have this ready for you. Also so sorry but we do not write on cakes. Please remember to bringing in your receipt and order number when collect. This helps our staff locate the cake for you. Please also remember that we can get busy and you may have to waiting a little bit longer due to volume of cakes going out at the same time. Please factor extra time if you are rushing so we can have it ready. As our cakes are made fresh to the time given some time things happen but we will do our best to make it work for your time. Collection for the cakes are at the retail shop 115 Sydney Road Brunswick. Also we don't write on cakes. Thanks for understanding Any questions about whole cakes please text us on the chat line through this site and we will help you as soon as we can. Happy shopping

lan-coffee-thornbury:
Thoughtfully crafted, playfully delicious.

At Flinch, we serve more than just great coffee — think seasonal flavours, fun drinks, and food that hits the spot without slowing you down. Whether you're grabbing a quick takeaway or settling in with friends, there's always something to enjoy. Don’t miss our rotating brunch specials too!

👉 Want the full menu? Download here

👇 Or browse some of our highlights below:

☕Specialty Coffee

Experience award-winning blends from Seven Miles Coffee Roasters.

Cat’s Pyjamas: Smooth and rich. Classic daily choice.

Wilde Blend: Gold Medal winner, with a fruity hint.

Cold Brew: Refreshing and bold.

Biscoff Latte: A sweet twist on a classic. Hot or Iced.

Affogato: Double espresso over vanilla or coconut ice cream.

🍵Matcha, Hojicha & Chai

Warm up or cool down with our cosy, flavour-packed drinks

Matcha Latte: Choose a lightly sweetened blend or 100% pure matcha

Hojicha Latte: Roasted green tea with a nutty depth

Chai Latte: Akardia spiced chai (powder) or loose-leaf masala

Specialty Matcha Creations: Try our Strawberry Iced Matcha, Coconut Matcha Cloud, Taro, Earl Grey Matcha, Pistachio Matcha, and more.

We source our matcha directly from a Japanese farm in Uji, Kyoto to guarantee peak freshness and quality in every sip.

Soba Noodles & Japanese Curry

Japanese-style dishes that suits different dietary requirements 

Soba Noodle Salad with flavourful toppings such as Grilled Chicken, Crispy Chicken, Teriyaki Crispy Tofu (vegan), Grilled Shrooms & Veg (vegan), Grilled Butter Prawns, or Tempura Prawns.

Japanese curry with katsu chicken, tempura prawns or tofu (vegan) served with rice or noodles. Limited specials.

🥞 Soufflé Pancakes

Indulge in our signature fluffy Japanese soufflé pancakes - always gluten-free*

Lemon Curd Berries & Cream: A delightful combination of tart and sweet.

Big Brekkie: A savoury twist with egg, bacon, and hash brown, stacked on our signature soufflé base.

Pandan Coconut: Light, fragrant pandan pancakes topped with whipped coconut cream and toasted coconut flakes.

*Gluten-Free: All our pancake bases are gluten-free. Non-gluten free toppings include Oreos and Biscoff.

🥪Sandwiches & Burgers

Satisfying options for every appetite. Highlights:

Deluxe Brekkie Wrap: Grilled bacon or halloumi, hash brown, scrambled eggs, spinach, avocado, and relish in a toasted tortilla.

B.L.A.T: Grilled bacon or halloumi, mixed salad, avocado, tomato, relish, and aioli on Turkish bread.

Get Flinched! Burger: 180g grilled Angus beef patty, cheese, pickles, tomato, Dijon mustard, tomato sauce, and Spanish onion.

Crispy Clucker Burger: Southern fried chicken, cheese, tomato, Spanish onion, and house burger sauce.

🥤Smoothies & Juices

Refreshing beverages made with 100% real fruits.

Banana Espresso Smoothie: Banana, vegan dark chocolate, peanut butter, two espresso shots, and almond milk (vg).

Berry Berry! Smoothie: Four-berry blend, organic rolled oats, oat milk, and maple syrup (vg).

Immunity Juice: Orange, apple, carrot, and ginger.

Tropical Hit Juice: Strawberry, orange, and pineapple.

the-full-pantry-croydon:
BULK WHOLE FOODS
The Full Pantry

BULK WHOLE FOODS MELBOURNE

Healthy whole foods should be affordable for everyone. We provide a wide choice of organic & regular bulk whole foods, including bulk honey, nut butters, and a huge range of nuts, seeds, herbs, spices and dried fruits for your pantry.

There are a host of advantages to buying bulk whole foods. Not only is it better for your health to consume natural whole foods, but buying bulk whole foods gives you the flexibility of buying as little or as much as you need. We stock organic, bio-dynamic and conventional bulk foods and work hard to source the best local and quality products where possible. Visit our Melbourne bulk store for everything you need for a balanced diet and minimal waste pantry. If you can’t make it into our store, a large range of our bulk whole foods can be purchased in our online store.

Take some time to relax in our beautiful whole foods cafe while trying our fantastic blend of coffee as well as our delicious all day brunch menu.

Our mission is to provide excellent service in helping you source the best quality produce for your dietary needs as well as a range of chemical-free household products. It is our priority to provide all these products with an effort to minimise/eliminate waste that can so easily be associated with daily living.

SHOP ONLINE

SHOP IN STORE

BRUNCH IN CAFE

Book table here
BULK WHOLE FOODS FOR YOU & THE PLANET

The value of your health and the future of our planet are priceless. Buying your whole food in bulk  has benefits now and into the future.

SUSTAINABILITY
WHOLEFOODS FOR BALANCE
AFFORDABILITY
We work hard to source products to stock in our store that come with the least amount of packaging. Where possible we choose packaging that is recyclable or biodegradable. When shopping with us, customers can purchase all their food packaging-free.

Shopping Bags: We do not use plastic bags in our store. We provide small and larger sized paper bags (at no charge) for you to fill with ingredients as you shop. We encourage you to bring your own bags and jars that you can fill directly.

Sourcing Whole Food: As much as possible all our bulk whole foods are sourced ethically. This means we favour products and companies that have minimal or recyclable packaging, are organic, and wherever possible, are Australian and locally grown or made.

Food Waste In Our Cafe: We strive to have the smallest environmental impact we can. The key to reducing waste in our cafe involves preparing sensible sized portions that reduce the amount of food that is thrown away. We use many of the same whole food ingredients in our cafe that we stock in the store. As much as possible ingredients are ethically sourced and bought in bulk, and we strive to only purchase food that has minimal, recyclable or biodegradable packaging.

HAPPY WHOLE FOODS CUSTOMERS
PETER J. MERICKA

the-old-milkbar-preston:
Happy Easter from the team of THE OLD MILK BAR CAFE.

We are closed on Easter Sunday 5th of April and Monday Easter 6th of April 2026.

Menu
Book A Table
MOUTH WATERING FOOD
IN THE HEART OF THORNBURY

Hand picked ingredients carefully orchestrated in to a delicious experience that will leave you wishing you had room in your belly for more!

Fresh produce everyday

Early each morning we carefully hand pick each ingredient for the day. This allows us to provide you with nutritious food & drinks that are full of natural flavours & rich scents.

Ambient atmosphere

We have converted an old Thornbury Milkbar into a comfy place for you enjoy delicious treats and socialize. We have created a beautiful out door & in door area for you to either be warmed by the sun or escape a chilled morning.

Really really good coffee

Amongst every other aspect of The Old Milkbar Cafe experience we take pride in our barista expertise. We have brewed coffee after coffee after coffee until we were able to make really REALLY good coffee. Unfortunately after you try our coffee no other coffee will do.

VIEW MENU
FIND US

From Paris to Melbourne — the same passion, the same taste

Notre Histoire

Our Story

Nestled on the vibrant High Street in Thornbury, Le Café Flo brings the warmth and charm of a Parisian neighbourhood café to Melbourne. Step inside and you'll find yourself surrounded by French vinyl records, vintage posters, and the irresistible aroma of freshly baked artisan breads.

Every dish is crafted with love — from our famous French baguettes and buttery croissants to hearty omelettes and seasonal salads. Paired with specialty coffee from Toby's Estate, every visit is a little escape to France.

Whether you're a local catching the tram 86 or discovering Thornbury for the first time, we welcome you to pull up a chair, savour the moment, and feel right at home.

“La vie est trop courte pour un mauvais café”

LIFE IS TOO SHORT FOR BAD COFFEE

red-bean-preston:
Buy your Melbourne coffee beans online from our selection of single origins and unique blends
Roasted in Melbourne

Our love affair with coffee has led us on a journey, sourcing only the highest quality ethically sourced Arabica coffee beans.

Browse our Selection
Partner with Red Bean

We can supply your establishment with our range of coffee beans, or help to create your own signature blend.

Wholesale Information
Red Bean Coffee are a Melbourne coffee roaster specialising in high quality Arabica coffee, grown at high altitudes of tropical and equatorial regions where coffee is diverse in flavour and varieties.

Our cafe is located at 121 Plenty Road, Preston right across from Brighton Ave. We serve some of the tastiest breakfast, brunch and lunch treats this side of Melbourne.

Our menu includes a variety of vegan-friendly dishes and delicious gluten-free cakes and desserts. We’re also a pet-friendly café and happily cater for large groups — perfect for casual catch-ups or special gatherings.

We source green coffee beans from ethical sources where farming communities and the land are sustainable, wildlife are protected, farmers are paid fairly, are properly equipped, and given opportunity for education and medical care.

We continue on a journey of evolving our understanding of coffee from farm to cup, and ensure that our intentions are respectful, ethical, and transparent with a positive purpose.

Our Tiger mascot symbolises bravery, protection and courage. The bravery and courage to protect the ecological balance of our natural environment and of wildlife. By purchasing our coffee, you are part of our journey towards a sustainable planet.

Respecting the journey of the bean.
